name: Amazon SageMaker AI
description: Registers Amazon SageMaker AI real-time endpoints as first-party OpenAI-compatible chat providers using configured endpoint names, model IDs, and short-lived bearer-token auth.

env.description: Fallback short-lived SageMaker bearer token used for inference when no bearer_token Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback short-lived SageMaker bearer token used for inference.
Fallback SageMaker endpoint name used when no endpoint_name Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback SageMaker inference component name used when no inference_component_name Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated model IDs exposed by the SageMaker endpoint when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: SageMaker bearer token
settings.description: Short-lived SageMaker bearer token authorized for OpenAI-compatible endpoint inference. Falls back to SAGEMAKER_BEARER_TOKEN or AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_SAGEMAKER.

settings.label: SageMaker endpoint name
settings.description: SageMaker real-time endpoint name that exposes /openai/v1/chat/completions. Falls back to SAGEMAKER_ENDPOINT_NAME.

settings.label: SageMaker inference component name
settings.description: Optional inference component name for endpoints that route OpenAI-compatible requests through /inference-components/{name}/openai/v1. Falls back to SAGEMAKER_INFERENCE_COMPONENT_NAME.

settings.label: SageMaker model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the endpoint. Some SageMaker containers ignore the OpenAI model field; use the model name expected by your container when needed. Falls back to comma-separated SAGEMAKER_MODEL_IDS.

settings.label: AWS region
settings.description: AWS region for the SageMaker runtime endpoint.

providers.name: Amazon SageMaker AI
providers.description: Registers configured SageMaker OpenAI-compatible chat endpoints and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
